questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Fever
questions.question_text: How would you prioritize care for a patient with multiple acute conditions?
expected_points: Assess fever using appropriate assessment tools

Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in amu setting

Check calculation twice
Consider patient factors

questions.title: Clinical Supervision
questions.question_text: How would you provide effective clinical supervision to a junior nurse in amu? What documentation and processes would you follow?
expected_points: Establish clear supervision framework
Regular review and feedback sessions
Document supervision activities
Support professional development
Address any concerns promptly
